prompt: Create a serene cinematic nature scene in a wide 16:9 landscape format: a tranquil lotus pond at golden sunrise, glowing with warm peach, pink, and amber light. In the exact center of the shallow water stands a single great blue heron, elegant and still, with its full reflection visible on the glassy surface. The foreground is filled with large dark green lily pads and exactly nine prominent pink lotus elements: six open lotus blossoms and three closed buds, arranged as one partial open blossom at the bottom-left edge, one tall open blossom on the left, one closed bud lower-left, one open blossom near center-left, one large open blossom lower-center, one closed bud near center-right, one small open blossom mid-right, one small closed bud in the right cluster, and one large open blossom at the bottom-right. On the left, a dramatic old weeping cherry tree leans over the pond, its dark twisting trunk and long hanging branches covered in delicate pale pink blossoms. Across the background, mist floats low over the water, with a forested hillside of pine and flowering trees silhouetted by the rising sun near the upper center-right. Add a small traditional lakeside pavilion or gazebo on the far right shoreline, partly hidden by haze and foliage. The water should mirror the sun, trees, heron, and blossoms with soft ripples, creating a peaceful spa-like atmosphere. Use ultra-detailed photorealistic fantasy realism, soft volumetric fog, gentle bloom, high dynamic range, pastel spring colors, tranquil composition, no people, no text, no watermark.
